abort.discovery_unsupported: Discovery flow is not supported by the Hue BLE integration.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Ensure the light is [made discoverable to voice assistants]({url_pairing_mode}).
error.no_scanners: No Bluetooth scanners are available to search for the light.
error.not_supported: The light is not a supported model.

confirm.description:
Do you want to set up {name} ({mac})?
Make sure the light is [made discoverable to voice assistants]({url_pairing_mode}) or has been [factory reset]({url_factory_reset}).

data_description.mac: Select the Hue device you want to set up
